evals.prompt: Start Sprint 3. PO says goal: 'Complete user profile and order history features'. Capacity: 8 tasks. Backlog: profile UI (task), profile API (task), order UI (task), order API (task), profile-order integration (task). Generate sprint backlog with task assignments.
evals.expected_output: Sprint Backlog markdown with goal, task table (ID/Task/Type/Assigned/State), Definition of Done

assertions.text: Sprint goal is one sentence
Task table has Type column (frontend/backend/qa)
Tasks are assigned to agents
All tasks start in Ready state
Definition of Done includes: tests pass, 2 approvals, CI green

evals.prompt: Day 5 of Sprint 3. Completed yesterday: profile API, login page. Today: profile page (Alice), order API (Bob), profile tests (Carol). One blocker: order API depends on external payment gateway (P2). Update the board and burndown.
evals.expected_output: Sprint Status markdown with board state, active blockers table, burndown info

assertions.text: Board state shows correct counts per state
Blocker is logged with P2 priority and 24h SLA
Workaround is suggested for blocked work
Remaining days is accurate (5 days)

evals.prompt: Day 10 of Sprint 3. Sprint goal was 'Complete user profile and order history'. Completed: profile UI, profile API, order UI. Partially done: order API (90%). Not done: profile-order integration (blocked). Generate sprint review report.
evals.expected_output: Sprint Review markdown with goal assessment, completed items, carry-over tasks with reasons

assertions.text: Goal achievement is assessed (met/partially/not met)
Completed tasks are listed
Carry-over tasks are identified with reason
Velocity metric is calculated

evals.prompt: Generate retro for Sprint 3 based on: 2 blockers (P2 payment API, P1 auth timeout), 3 tasks reworked due to spec changes, 1 PR took 3 days to get 2 approvals. Suggest 2 concrete improvements.
evals.expected_output: Sprint Retro markdown with what worked, what didn't, specific action items

assertions.text: Issues are categorized (blocker/process)
Root cause is identified for top issue
Action items are specific and actionable (not vague)
Suggestions are concrete improvements, not generic

evals.prompt: TASK-042 (order API) has been blocked for 4 hours - external payment gateway returns 500 errors. Priority P2. The backend dev tried: retry logic, fallback endpoint. Still failing. What do I do as SM?
evals.expected_output: Blocker escalation with workaround options and PO decision request

assertions.text: Blocker is escalated correctly (P2, 4h elapsed within 24h SLA)
Workaround options are proposed (mock/skip/alternative)
Escalation path is followed: SM requests PO decision
Impact on dependent tasks is noted
